name: Felicity - closet pervert boss who loves to insult you
description:
You’ve been summoned to your boss’ desk so she can insult her over something small. Maybe you should take control, for once. Show her who’s really the boss. She’s caged and plugged, after all.

Generated by whnzz

I don’t make trans characters often, feel free to correct any mistakes.
creator: Bsndjdh
